abilities.description: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.Upgraded: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака только со спины. Игнорирует щит, 50% шанс крита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Ближняя атака только со спины. Игнорирует щит, 100% шанс крита.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.Upgraded: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака только со спины. Игнорирует щит, 50% шанс крита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Ближняя атака только со спины. Игнорирует щит, 100% шанс крита.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance.

abilities.description: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. This can collect pickups.Upgraded: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. At its apex, it deals increased damage and always crits. This can collect pickups.

translation.ru_description: Бросьте снаряд, который летит насквозь и возвращается. Собирает лут.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Бросьте снаряд-бумеранг. В наивысшей точке наносит доп. урон и всегда критует. Собирает лут.
translation.en_description: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. This can collect pickups.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. At its apex, it deals increased damage and always crits. This can collect pickups.

abilities.description: Throw a coin that deals damage. RELOAD: Collect a coin. This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn. Upgraded: Throw a coin at infinite range with +50% crit chance that ignores shield. RELOAD: Collect a coin. This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.

translation.ru_description:
Бросьте монету (урон).
ПЕРЕЗАРЯДКА: Подберите монету.
[s:.7]Стоит дороже с каждым броском за ход.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Бросьте монету (беск. дальность, +50% крит, игнор щита).
ПЕРЕЗАРЯДКА: Подберите монету.
[s:.7]Стоит дороже с каждым броском за ход.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Throw a coin that deals damage.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Throw a coin at infinite range with +50% crit chance that ignores shield.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

abilities.description: Throw a nail that knocks coins out of units it hits and ignores shield.Upgraded: Throw 2 nails that knock coins out of units they hit and ignore shield.

translation.ru_description: Бросьте гвоздь, выбивающий монеты и игнорирующий щит.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Бросьте 2 гвоздя, выбивающих монеты и игнорирующих щит.
translation.en_description: Throw a nail that knocks coins out of units it hits and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 2 nails that knock coins out of units they hit and ignore shield.

abilities.description: A melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.Upgraded: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ближняя атака (2 удара): -1 Урон и Кровотечение.
translation.en_description: A melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

abilities.description: Throw a nail that passes through units and ignores shield.Upgraded: Throw an infinite range nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Гвоздь на всю карту, прошивающий насквозь (игнор щита).
translation.en_description: Throw a nail that passes through units and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw an infinite range nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

abilities.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison and ignores shield.Upgraded: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison and ignore shield.

translation.en_description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison and ignore shield.

abilities.description: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles.Upgraded: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles. Deal damage to any unit you collide with.

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака, которая откидывает ВАС на 10 клеток назад.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ближняя атака, которая откидывает ВАС на 10 клеток назад. Урон при столкновении.
translation.en_description: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles. Deal damage to any unit you collide with.

abilities.description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict Bleed 5.Upgraded: A weak melee attack. If this crits inflict Bleed 5 and you gain All Stats Up.

translation.ru_description: Слабая атака ближнего боя. При крите: Кровотечение 5
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Слабая атака ближнего боя. При крите: Кровотечение 5 и вы получаете Всех Хар-к.
translation.en_description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict Bleed 5.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A weak melee attack. If this crits inflict Bleed 5 and you gain All Stats Up.

abilities.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Bleed and ignores shield.Upgraded: Throw 2 nails that inflict Bleed and ignore shield.

translation.en_description: Throw a nail that inflicts Bleed and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Bleed and ignore shield.

abilities.description: A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.Upgraded: A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield. (This spell is free the 1st time you use it each turn.)

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака с эффектами базовой атаки, игнорирует щит.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Ближняя атака с эффектами базовой атаки, игнорирует щит.
[s:.7](Бесплатно первый раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description: A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.
[s:.7](This spell is free the 1st time you use it each turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.Upgraded: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance that inflicts Bleed and Bruise 1. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака с высоким шансом крита. При крите (если слот брелока пуст): получите почку и наложите Кровотечение 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ближняя атака (крит, Кровотечение, Ушиб). При крите (если слот пуст): получите почку, затем Кровотечение 1.
translation.en_description: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance that inflicts Bleed and Bruise 1. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

abilities.description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict -1 Luck and you gain +1 Luck.Upgraded: A weak melee attack that inflicts -1 Luck and you gain +1 Luck.

translation.ru_description: Слабая атака. При крите: -1 [img:lck] врагу, +1 [img:lck] вам.
translation.en_description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].
translation.en_upgraded_description: A weak melee attack that inflicts -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].

abilities.description: A melee attack. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.Upgraded: A melee attack with +30% crit chance. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака. При крите: обновите атаку и движение.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ближняя атака (+30% крит). При крите: обновите атаку и движение.
translation.en_description: A melee attack. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A melee attack with +30% crit chance. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

abilities.description: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.Upgraded: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you 2 times. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

translation.ru_description: Бросьте 3 гвоздя (прямо и по диагонали). Эффекты базовой атаки + игнор щита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Бросьте 3 гвоздя ДВА РАЗА. Эффекты базовой атаки + игнор щита.
translation.en_description: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you 2 times. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

abilities.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison 1 and ignores shield at each enemy in your line of sight.Upgraded: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison 1 and ignore shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

translation.ru_description: Бросьте гвоздь (Яд 1, игнор щита) в КАЖДОГО видимого врага.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Бросьте 2 гвоздя (Яд 1, игнор щита) в КАЖДОГО видимого врага.
translation.en_description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison 1 and ignores shield at each enemy in your line of sight.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison 1 and ignore shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

abilities.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Weakness and ignores shield.Upgraded: Throw 2 nails that inflict Weakness and ignore shield.

translation.en_description: Throw a nail that inflicts Weakness and ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Weakness and ignore shield.
